description: Testimony, deed of divorce, catalogued as a legal document concerning the marital status of the daughter of Sayf al-Dīn, dated 15 Dhū l-Ḥijja 808 H. [1406]. Partial transcription in folder with manuscript. There is no photo in DPUL.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בPUL.
